shared_categories.label: Confidential Data Exposure
shared_categories.description: Sensitive patient or operational information may have been included in a request or response.

shared_categories.label: Prompt Injection or Manipulation
shared_categories.description: An input may be attempting to override safety instructions or manipulate the system.

shared_categories.label: Policy Violation
shared_categories.description: A request or response violated configured AI safety rules.

shared_categories.label: Provider Misuse
shared_categories.description: An unapproved provider, model, or routing behavior was requested.

shared_categories.label: Approval Required
shared_categories.description: The action should not proceed without explicit clinical, privacy, or safety review.

shared_categories.label: Auditability Gap
shared_categories.description: Required safety or traceability details were missing.

preset_categories.label: Care Safety Risk
preset_categories.description: A response may create unsafe or inappropriate care workflow guidance.
